genealogy.mixed_breed_reasoning: The dog possesses highly recognizable physical traits consistent with a purebred Cocker Spaniel. These include the prominent, long, pendulous ears covered in wavy hair, a well-developed, square muzzle, and large, dark, expressive eyes set in a gently contoured head. The solid, rich golden-red coat is also a classic presentation for the breed.

creative_descriptions.fun_description: With ears that could double as glamorous, wavy hair extensions and big, soulful eyes that demand endless treats, this elegant canine is a certified heartbreaker. Look at that majestic golden coat!
creative_descriptions.fun_caption: Practicing my best 'puppy dog eyes' to see if it earns me extra dinner. 🥺✨
creative_descriptions.happy_sentence: I can't wait to bound through some tall grass on a sunny day and then snuggle up right next to you on the couch!
creative_descriptions.breed_fact: The name 'Cocker' in Cocker Spaniel originates from the breed's historical use in the UK specifically to hunt a game bird known as the Eurasian woodcock.
